package rulefixtures

// scenario for bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk_export: File or socket writes inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule344PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario344Positive(records []Rule344PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
